sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9619" key="a)ntendu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεν-δύομαι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n9619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put on instead,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.139c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
